checkpoints.retryInstructions: Re-run all checks and verify that eval(), dangerouslySetInnerHTML, hardcoded secrets, command injection, and SQL injection scans completed. Ensure each check has an explicit pass/fail finding.
Re-scan the src/ directory. Ensure file-existence check ran and all shell-based checks produced findings.
Re-run the deep LLM security review and the dependency review. Both must produce at least one finding.
